title: ricinocarpus setosus
intro: Ricinocarpus setosus, also known as the spiny ricinocarpus, is a plant species that belongs to the family Celastraceae. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various skin conditions due to its antiseptic and antifungal properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and ointments, which are applied topically to treat skin irritations and infections.
